seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Billa Billa and Bilyana. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Billa Billa vs Bilyana: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Billa Billa and Bilyana.
heading: Billa Billa vs Bilyana — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Billa Billa, Queensland and Bilyana, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bilyana has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Billa Billa (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Billa Billa or Bilyana safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Billa Billa has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Bilyana scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Billa Billa scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Bilyana scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Billa Billa or Bilyana?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bilyana has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
